failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG DES crystallization or particulate fouling at valve seat
failure_modes.mitigation: Install redundant BPR in parallel with heated valve body at 130°C

failure_modes.cause: HPLC pump minimum flow limit exceeded at Q=0.236 mL/min
failure_modes.mitigation: Use syringe pump or add recirculation loop to maintain pump minimum flow

failure_modes.cause: Non-uniform heating in 16m coil creates temperature gradients >20°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement distributed heating zones with independent temperature control

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow and creates overpressure risk
validation_experiments: Run TBAB/EG DES at Q=0.236 mL/min for 8 hours; monitor BPR pressure stability ±2%
Test pump performance at Q=0.2-0.3 mL/min range; verify no cavitation or flow pulsation
Map temperature profile across 16m coil using IR thermography; verify ΔT < 10°C
